arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Brighton: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The Seagulls are no strangers to fast Premier League starts, but Fabian Hurzeler will know that his side have to be at their very best to maintain their unbeaten opening to the new season this weekend. An in-form Chelsea host one of four unbeaten teams left in the Premier League on Saturday as Brighton visit Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Chelsea willing to do whatever it takes to sign €100 million-rated La Liga star
arts.sum: Real Madrid midfielder Aurelien Tchouameni is reportedly a target for Premier League clubs, Chelsea and Manchester City. The 24-year-old French international has been an important player for Real Madrid since joining the club from AS Monaco and his performances have attracted the attention of the English clubs. arts.ttl: We simulated Chelsea vs Brighton to get a score prediction for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Chelsea will be looking to make it three wins in a row in the Premier League later today when they host Brighton & Hove Albion. We predict that Chelsea could set up in a 4-2-3-1 formation, with their line-up as follows: Sanchez; Gusto, Fofana, Colwill, Cucurella; Caicedo, Enzo; Madueke, Palmer, Sancho; Jackson.

arts.sum: Callum Hudson-Odoi has shared why he needed to get out of Chelsea and the reasons behind his exit.

It was the transfer saga that dominated the whole summer window, and in the end, Chelsea evidently failed to land their major target, Victor Osimhen.
